error.device_not_registered: Device is not registered in Tuya cloud

device.description: Select the Gimdow Lock to setup. The device must be registered in the Tuya cloud using the mobile application. Ensure it is unbound from any Tuya Bluetooth gateway.

manual.title: Manual Configuration
manual.description: Enter the device keys manually if you have them.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Gimdow Lock
reauth_confirm.description: The current credentials are invalid or expired. Please enter new Tuya IoT credentials.

error.device_not_registered: Device is not registered in Tuya cloud

data.unknown_state_action: Action when Lock State is Unknown

data_description.unknown_state_action: After a BLE reconnect the lock state is unknown until the motor physically moves. 'Confirm Last' and 'Force Lock Twice' resolve state automatically on reconnect. 'Double on Action' waits and resolves only when you issue the next lock or unlock command. Note: When State Transition Timeout is set to 0, all strategies use a 60-second minimum echo timeout.

init.description: Configure optional settings for the Gimdow Lock.

options.confirm_last: Confirm last known state (auto on reconnect)
options.double_on_action: Keep unknown — double-command on next action
